# Claude Code — iOS Setup

> A curated, UI-first iOS development setup for Claude Code. 42 skills span a five-phase lifecycle (Setup → Plan → Build → Verify → Ship), plus SwiftUI/Swift craft specialists and framework-integration skills that trigger automatically while you read or write code. Each skill is a `SKILL.md` with frontmatter and instructions; `/ios` is the orchestrator that detects project state and routes to the next step. Install via `/plugin marketplace add moritztucher/claude-code-ios-setup` then `/plugin install ios-setup@claude-code-ios-setup`, or copy into `~/.claude/`.

## Setup

- [ios](ios/SKILL.md): Orchestrator — detects project state, shows a status map, routes to the next step.
- [ios-load](ios-load/SKILL.md): Load the iOS guide into an ad-hoc chat that has no project `CLAUDE.md`.
- [ios-init](ios-init/SKILL.md): Initialize a project from a few sentences — generates the doc set, `.gitignore`, `LICENSE`, `README`. Auto-detects new / fresh-scaffold / existing.

## Plan

- [ios-brief](ios-brief/SKILL.md): Build and maintain the living project brief — features split into UI + Logic/Backend, MVP vs Later. Draft-first.
- [ios-design-brief](ios-design-brief/SKILL.md): Establish the visual design system — looks at the running app, proposes a direction, writes implementable SwiftUI specs.

## Build

- [ios-design-elevate](ios-design-elevate/SKILL.md): Apply the design system view by view, verifying each screen visually (build → screenshot → compare → iterate); never touches business logic.
- [ios-build](ios-build/SKILL.md): Build the Xcode project and report results.
- [ios-test](ios-test/SKILL.md): Run unit and UI tests.
- [ios-automate](ios-automate/SKILL.md): iOS Simulator automation via the AXe CLI — tap, swipe, type, screenshot, video.

## Verify

- [ios-review](ios-review/SKILL.md): Thorough code review on changes or specified files.
- [ios-audit](ios-audit/SKILL.md): Holistic project audit through PM, UX, UI, ARCH lenses.
- [ios-design-audit](ios-design-audit/SKILL.md): Visual craft audit — screenshots the running app and judges real screens, with severity-rated findings and elevation suggestions.
- [ios-onboarding-audit](ios-onboarding-audit/SKILL.md): Walk the real onboarding flow in the simulator (or design one) — activation psychology, permission timing, measured time-to-value.

## Ship

- [ios-commit](ios-commit/SKILL.md): Create a well-formed commit following project conventions.
- [pr-to-develop](pr-to-develop/SKILL.md): Create a PR from the current branch into develop with a structured template.
- [pr-to-main](pr-to-main/SKILL.md): Create a release PR from develop into main.
- [ios-release-notes](ios-release-notes/SKILL.md): Summarize git commits between two version tags into a paste-ready App Store "What's New".

## SwiftUI + Swift craft (model-invoked)

- [swiftui-pro](swiftui-pro/SKILL.md): Comprehensive SwiftUI code review — modern APIs, performance, accessibility. From Paul Hudson (MIT).
- [swiftui-expert-skill](swiftui-expert-skill/SKILL.md): SwiftUI guidance incl. iOS 26 Liquid Glass and Instruments `.trace` analysis. From Antoine van der Lee.
- [swift-concurrency](swift-concurrency/SKILL.md): Diagnose concurrency issues, refactor to async/await, guide Swift 6 migration. From Antoine van der Lee.

## Framework integration (model-invoked)

Lean decision layer (numbered dials + anti-rationalization table + verification gate) over a deep API reference in each skill's `references/`. Currency-checked against Apple/vendor docs via Context7.

- [storekit](storekit/SKILL.md): In-app purchases and subscriptions with StoreKit 2 — products, purchase flow, transaction verification, entitlements, restore, testing.
- [revenuecat](revenuecat/SKILL.md): IAP, subscriptions, and paywalls via RevenueCat — Purchases SDK, offerings, CustomerInfo entitlements, RevenueCatUI.
- [widgetkit](widgetkit/SKILL.md): Home/lock screen and Control Center widgets — TimelineProvider, configuration, interactive widgets, update strategies.
- [liquid-glass](liquid-glass/SKILL.md): iOS 26 Liquid Glass in SwiftUI — glassEffect, GlassEffectContainer, glass button styles, batching, fallbacks.
- [foundation-models](foundation-models/SKILL.md): Apple's on-device LLM — LanguageModelSession, @Generable guided generation, tool calling, streaming, availability.
- [appintents](appintents/SKILL.md): Siri, Shortcuts, and Spotlight — AppIntent, AppShortcut, AppEntity/EntityQuery, dialog/snippet output.
- [swiftdata](swiftdata/SKILL.md): Persistence with SwiftData — @Model, @Query, #Predicate, relationships, concurrency, versioned migrations.
- [activitykit](activitykit/SKILL.md): Live Activities and Dynamic Island — ActivityAttributes, push-token/push-to-start updates, dynamic island regions.
- [backgroundtasks](backgroundtasks/SKILL.md): Deferred background work — BGTaskScheduler, app-refresh/processing/continued tasks, scheduling constraints.
- [watchconnectivity](watchconnectivity/SKILL.md): iPhone↔Apple Watch sync — WCSession, messages, application context, file/userInfo transfers, activation lifecycle.
- [usernotifications](usernotifications/SKILL.md): Local and remote notifications — authorization, content, triggers, categories/actions, APNs registration, delegate handling.
- [healthkit](healthkit/SKILL.md): Health data — HKHealthStore authorization, sample/statistics/anchored queries, workouts, background delivery.
- [cloudkit](cloudkit/SKILL.md): iCloud storage and sync — CKContainer/database scopes, CKRecord, queries, subscriptions, CKShare, CKSyncEngine.
- [corelocation](corelocation/SKILL.md): User location — CLLocationManager authorization, CLLocationUpdate.liveUpdates, CLMonitor geofencing/beacons.
- [corebluetooth](corebluetooth/SKILL.md): BLE — CBCentralManager scan/connect, services/characteristics, notify/write, peripheral role, background modes.
- [authenticationservices](authenticationservices/SKILL.md): Sign in with Apple, passkeys, and OAuth via ASWebAuthenticationSession — credential state, associated domains.
- [localauthentication](localauthentication/SKILL.md): Biometric auth — LAContext, Face ID/Touch ID, policy evaluation, Keychain access-control binding.
- [tipkit](tipkit/SKILL.md): In-app tips and feature discovery — Tip rules/events, TipView/popoverTip, display frequency, Tips.configure.
- [swift-charts](swift-charts/SKILL.md): Data visualization — Chart marks, axes/scales, selection interactivity, scrolling, iOS 26 Chart3D.
- [coreml](coreml/SKILL.md): On-device ML inference — MLModel loading, compute units, async prediction, Vision integration, stateful models.

## Meta

- [ios-agents](ios-agents/SKILL.md): List all available subagents.
- [compact-summary](compact-summary/SKILL.md): Compress the current session into a reusable context primer.
